summary: First-iteration end-to-end testing of Nasser Cubiertas weekly-menu system. Backend (22/22 pytest tests) and frontend (14/14 Playwright checks) all passed. Covered auth (recepcion/rec73491654), Mara Excel upload/parse, Sabrositos text parse, manual menu CRUD, upsert of selections (case-insensitive), XLSX export with token query-param, reset, and full collaborator flow (name validation, provider pick, per-day radio selection, submit).
critical_code_review_comments: OrderForm.jsx line 84-85: `userName` uses `localStorage.getItem() || (typeof window !== 'undefined' && '')` — the fallback expression evaluates to `false` (boolean) when localStorage is empty in SSR. Not currently harmful because effect redirects to '/', but cleaner to fallback to empty string ''.

server.py: DELETE /selections/reset uses HTTP DELETE with a query param for provider — works but is subtly non-idempotent from a REST perspective; consider validating provider against {mara,sabrositos} to avoid accidental full wipe when provider param is omitted.

server.py parse_mara_excel is heuristic (string prefix matching for ENS/PAN/MANDIOCA to detect sides). Works for the sample file but brittle if Mara changes column layout. Consider adding regression fixtures.

MenuEditor.normalize is declared as a const inside the component but is used inside the useEffect that runs on mount — because it's re-created every render this is fine but eslint-disable-next-line masks the dependency; safe to leave.
Admin token is stored in localStorage — acceptable for this internal tool but token has no expiration. Consider adding server-side session/JWT with exp for production hardening.
AdminOrders.download builds URL with token in query string and opens in new window: token is exposed in server access logs/history. For internal use this is OK; document risk.
test_credentials: Admin: recepcion / rec73491654 (also written in /app/backend/.env). No end-user auth for collaborators — they use name+surname only.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed selections and use test menus with week 2026-01-05 and 2026-02-02. Cleanup fixture resets both provider selections before and after the suite. UI flow additionally left a 'Juan Perez' collaborator selection which the subsequent reset step deleted.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend endpoints verified: /api/admin/login, /api/menus (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE), /api/menus/active, /api/menus/parse-excel (using /tmp/mara.xlsx), /api/menus/parse-text, /api/selections (POST/GET with auth, upsert by user_name_lc+menu_id), /api/selections/export?provider=&token=&menu_id= (returns real xlsx starting with PK zip signature and Content-Disposition attachment), /api/selections/reset. Frontend flow: Home name validation requires >=2 space-separated words, redirects to /order, provider tabs work, day toggle, radios with data-testids (bf/main/diet/side)-{day}-{index}, submit shows 'Pedido guardado' toast, admin table shows the order, reset works via confirm dialog. Excel upload UI hydrates all days including breakfast list. Nothing to retest.
